sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, to refuse, see the verbal adj. (Syr. ܡܶܐܢ, always impers. ܡܶܐܢܰܬܠܺܝ I am wearied; Aph. to cease, to leave off. Cognate is מָנַע, see אוּן , אִין p. 21, A ).

Piel מֵאֵז to refuse, to be unwilling (opp. to אָבָה), Gen 39:8 Isa 1:20 1Sa 28:23 followed by an inf. Num 22:14 Psa 77:3 by a gerund, Exo 7:14 22:16 Jer 25:28.
